description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: 1. An incident response template filled in with information from the coordination meeting;
2. Incident artifacts, including files, screenshots, documents, and links;
3. Chat transcripts from the approved communication channels specified in [A.1.8.1.3 - Emergency Response Communication Channels](18418289-ada8-401d-a992-7e38b235c866).
description: @blimpa @Coolcatcatio This PR updates all lists within the Atlas to follow the markdown specification. It also adds a markdownlint config file to start the process of fixing formatting across editors.

diff: To achieve continuous improvement of emergency response processes, records should be retained post-incident to enable review of actions taken during the incident response. Such records may include but are not limited to:

summary: Update Emergency Response Article To Agent Framework
description: Updates the Emergency Response Article to reflect the Agent Framework, assigning emergency response authority to the Core Facilitator and Core GovOps.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
